equivalence_judgment: Not equivalent if the intended latent is the contextual hidden of <THINKING> itself. Equivalent only if the intended Heima latent is the predictor hidden immediately before <THINKING>, matching the official next-token-shift implementation.
hf_gpt2_semantics: HF GPT-2 hidden_states[-1][position] is the contextual representation after consuming token at position. The direct <THINKING> hidden is position t; the official shifted mask selects t-1, the predictor position for token t.
official_shift_source: heima/main_python/2-training...py:1503-1532 masks tokens[:, 1:] == thinking_id, selecting the hidden state that predicts the thinking token under next-token CE.
recommendation: Use backend-specific adapter; do not mechanically set heima_shifted_hidden=true unless matching official predictor-hidden semantics is the desired experiment.
